parameters.jsCode: const b=($input.first().json.body)||{};const name=(b.name||'').toString().trim()||'Unknown';const phone=(b.phone||'').toString().trim()||'?';const town=(b.address||'').toString().trim()||'?';const service=(b.service||'').toString().trim()||'?';const when=(b.timing||b.preferred_day||'').toString().trim();const notes=(b.notes||'').toString().trim()||'-';const source=(b.source||'website').toString();const days={sunday:0,monday:1,tuesday:2,wednesday:3,thursday:4,friday:5,saturday:6};const now=new Date();function nextDow(t){for(let i=1;i<=14;i++){const d=new Date(now);d.setDate(now.getDate()+i);if(d.getDay()===t)return d;}return now;}let target=null;const w=when.toLowerCase();for(const k in days){if(w.indexOf(k)>=0){target=nextDow(days[k]);break;}}if(!target){if(w.indexOf('next week')>=0)target=nextDow(1);else if(w.indexOf('tomorrow')>=0){target=new Date(now);target.setDate(now.getDate()+1);}else if(w.indexOf('today')>=0){target=new Date(now);}else{target=new Date(now);target.setDate(now.getDate()+1);}}let g=target.getDay();if(g===5)target.setDate(target.getDate()+3);else if(g===6)target.setDate(target.getDate()+2);else if(g===0)target.setDate(target.getDate()+1);const pad=function(n){return(''+n).padStart(2,'0');};const date=target.getFullYear()+'-'+pad(target.getMonth()+1)+'-'+pad(target.getDate());const start=date+'T09:00:00';const end=date+'T10:00:00';const summary='HOLD (confirm time): '+name+' - '+service+' ('+town+')';const description=['BOOKING REQUEST ('+source+')','Name: '+name,'Phone: '+phone,'Town: '+town,'Service: '+service,'Preferred: '+(when||'(none given)'),'Notes: '+notes,'','Placeholder hold - call to confirm the exact time, then move this event.'].join('\n');const alert=name+'  |  '+phone+'  |  '+town+'  |  '+service+'  |  '+(when||'no pref')+'  |  '+notes;return [{json:{name:name,phone:phone,town:town,service:service,when:when,notes:notes,source:source,date:date,start:start,end:end,summary:summary,description:description,alert:alert}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { topic: 'heritage-leads-CHANGE-ME', title: 'New carpet lead', priority: 4, tags: ['moneybag'], message: $('Build booking').item.json.alert } }}
